acceptance_criteria.criterion: npm install completes without errors inside mcp-server/
npx tsx mcp-server/src/index.ts starts the MCP server without runtime errors
timestamp.now() returns a string matching the pattern YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS
formatWpId(1) returns WP-001 and parseWpId(WP-042) returns 42
TypeScript compiles without errors (npx tsc --noEmit in mcp-server/)

summary: Created mcp-server/ directory structure with package.json and tsconfig.json
Created src/utils/timestamp.ts with now() function for YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS formatting
Created src/utils/wp-id.ts with formatWpId() and parseWpId() functions
Resolved corporate npm registry issue by creating local .npmrc
Successfully ran npm install with all dependencies
Verified TypeScript compilation and server startup

comments.note: No observations — code in the touched files is clean and consistent. The directory structure matches the plan, all imports use .js extensions for ESM compatibility, and no stdout writes are present.

summary: Verified TypeScript compilation passes with npx tsc --noEmit
Confirmed server starts successfully and registers all tools
Validated package.json structure and dependencies are correctly specified
Verified tsconfig.json uses correct ESM settings (Node16 module resolution)
Confirmed all imports use .js extensions for ESM compatibility
Verified timestamp.now() returns correct format matching YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS pattern
Verified formatWpId and parseWpId functions work as specified
Confirmed no stdout writes present (only stderr logging)
